quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly states the effect (speed increase) and the condition (affixed to hooves of a creature).
quality.completeness: Good. Includes type, rarity, attunement requirement, and effect description.

effect.description: Increases the creature's walking speed by 30 feet.
effect.condition: While all four shoes are affixed to the hooves of a horse or similar creature.

mechanics.potential_issues: None immediately apparent based on provided data, standard D&D 5e-like item structure.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: Data is clean, consistent, and the mechanics are clearly defined for an enhancement item.
